channel.title: Posts on Tectalks
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tectalks

item.title: Blogging With Hugo
item.description: It’s been a while since this blog was updated. Today I’ve decided to bring a new life to my blog with a new backend and new theme. I had been using Wordpress for blogging for a while and felt it was an overkill for a simple blog. Tried out Jekyll, however the experience was not ideal for me. In comparison, setting up Hugo was a breeze. I was able to install Hugo, set it up and deploy all under 30 minutes!
